nodes.label: Suspected Appendicitis
nodes.description: Routed from main triage / 来自主分流

nodes.label: Alvarado Score Calculation
nodes.description:
Requires: CBC with differential + physical examination
Score 0–10:
  ① Migration of pain to RLQ  +1
  ② Anorexia                  +1
  ③ Nausea / Vomiting         +1
  ④ RLQ Tenderness            +2
  ⑤ Rebound Tenderness        +1
  ⑥ Temp ≥ 37.3 °C           +1
  ⑦ WBC > 10,000              +2
  ⑧ Left Shift (bands)        +1

nodes.label: Observe / Discharge with Follow-up
nodes.description: Low risk (Alvarado ≤3): outpatient monitoring acceptable / 低风险，观察或出院随访

nodes.label: Appendicitis Low Risk (Outpatient Monitoring)
nodes.description:
Alvarado ≤3 — low pre-test probability; outpatient monitoring acceptable.
NOT a definitive exclusion: ~10% PPV at this score threshold.
低风险（Alvarado≤3）：门诊随访即可，非影像确认排除

nodes.label: Abdominal Ultrasound
nodes.description:
Preferred first-line for: children, pregnant women, young females
中风险4–6分首选超声（儿童/孕妇/年轻女性优先）

nodes.label: US Findings — Appendicitis Confirmed by Ultrasound
nodes.description:
Appendicitis confirmed on US; assess for complications visible on US
CT not required when US is diagnostic (WSES 2020)
超声确认阑尾炎，评估超声下并发症征象；超声确诊时无需CT（WSES 2020）

nodes.label: CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast (after non-diagnostic US)
nodes.description:
After non-diagnostic US in intermediate-risk patients
Sensitivity >95% for appendicitis / 超声不确定后进行CT（敏感性>95%）

nodes.label: CT Abdomen/Pelvis or Direct Surgical Consult (High Risk)
nodes.description:
High risk (Alvarado 7–10)
Males < 40y may proceed directly to surgical consult without CT
高风险直接CT或手术会诊（<40岁男性可直接手术会诊）

nodes.label: CT Findings Evaluation
nodes.description: Interpret CT for appendicitis confirmation / CT结果判断

nodes.label: Appendicitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis
nodes.description: CT negative for appendicitis / CT阴性，排除阑尾炎

nodes.label: Uncomplicated Appendicitis
nodes.description:
Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT); no perforation / abscess / phlegmon
→ Surgical consult: laparoscopic appendectomy vs antibiotics
非复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT确认，无穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 手术 vs 抗生素治疗

nodes.label: Complicated Appendicitis
nodes.description:
Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT) with perforation / abscess / phlegmon
→ Surgical consult required
复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT见穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 外科会诊

edges.when: US positive — no perforation/abscess on US
Score 7–10 — High Risk → CT or Surgical Consult

nodes.label: Suspected Cholecystitis
nodes.description: Routed from main triage / 来自主分流

nodes.label: TG18 Group A — Local Inflammation Signs
nodes.description:
Physical examination:
  ① Murphy's sign positive
  ② RUQ pain / tenderness / palpable mass
局部炎症体征（体格检查）

nodes.label: TG18 Group B — Systemic Inflammation Signs
nodes.description:
Labs + vitals + HPI narrative:
  ① Fever > 38 °C (admission PE vitals)
  ② Fever reported in HPI (home/pre-admission fever history)
  ③ CRP elevated
  ④ WBC elevated (leukocytosis)
全身炎症体征（体格检查 + CBC + CRP + HPI发热史）
注：MIMIC入院体温常已退热，HPI发热叙述作为补充B组依据

nodes.label: Both Group A AND Group B Met?
nodes.description:
TG18 suspected diagnosis gate
疑似诊断门控：A组≥1项 AND B组≥1项

nodes.label: Cholecystitis Not Suspected (Clinical Only)
nodes.description:
Neither TG18 Group A nor Group B met — no local or systemic signs of cholecystitis.
NOT imaging-confirmed exclusion; very low clinical suspicion.
A组和B组均未满足：无局部或全身炎症体征，极低怀疑度，非影像排除

nodes.label: Cholecystitis Excluded (Imaging Confirmed)
nodes.description:
Additional imaging (HIDA/CT/MRCP) negative — diagnosis excluded.
影像学阴性确认排除胆囊炎

nodes.label: Abdominal Ultrasound (TG18 Group C)
nodes.description:
First-line imaging:
  - GB wall thickening > 4mm
  - Pericholecystic fluid
  - Sonographic Murphy's sign
  - Gallstones
腹部超声首选（胆囊壁增厚/胆囊周围积液/超声Murphy征/胆结石）

nodes.label: Additional Imaging (US inconclusive)
nodes.description:
HIDA scan (functional; preferred for acalculous)
OR CT Abdomen (anatomical detail)
OR MRCP (if biliary stones suspected)
Also check: LFTs · Bilirubin · GGT
超声不确定时追加：HIDA扫描 / CT / MRCP + LFTs

nodes.label: MRCP for Suspected Choledocholithiasis
nodes.description:
Evaluate for common bile duct stones if biliary etiology suspected
追加MRCP排查胆总管结石

nodes.label: TG18 Severity Grading
nodes.description:
Requires confirmed diagnosis (A+B+C)
Assess organ dysfunction and local complications
确定诊断后进行TG18严重度分级

nodes.label: Grade I — Mild Cholecystitis
nodes.description:
No organ dysfunction · mild GB disease
轻度：无器官功能障碍，轻度胆囊炎症

nodes.label: Grade II — Moderate Cholecystitis
nodes.description:
No organ dysfunction + ≥1 local complication criterion:
  - WBC > 18,000
  - Palpable tender RUQ mass
  - Symptom duration > 72h
  - Gangrenous / emphysematous GB on imaging
中度：无器官功能障碍但存在局部并发症

nodes.label: Grade III — Severe Cholecystitis
nodes.description:
≥1 organ system dysfunction:
  cardiovascular · neurological · respiratory
  renal · hepatic · hematologic
重度：≥1项器官系统功能障碍

edges.when: A ≥1 AND B ≥1 → Strong suspicion — proceed to imaging
A ≥1 OR B ≥1 → Weak suspicion — proceed to imaging
Neither A nor B criteria met → Not suspected (clinical only)
US positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones
US positive — definite diagnosis (no high risk for CBD stones)
Additional imaging positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones
Additional imaging positive (no high risk for CBD stones or MRCP done)
Additional imaging negative — diagnosis excluded by imaging
No organ dysfunction + local complication criteria
No organ dysfunction, no local complications

nodes.label: Suspected Diverticulitis
nodes.description: Routed from main triage / 来自主分流

nodes.label: Laboratory Workup
nodes.description:
CBC (WBC) · BMP · CRP · UA · β-hCG (females)
Note: WBC normal in ~45% of patients
CRP > 200 mg/L suggests possible perforation
实验室检查（WBC在45%患者中可正常；CRP>200提示可能穿孔）

nodes.label: Clinical Assessment
nodes.description:
Assess suspicion level and risk factors
临床评估：怀疑程度 + 危险因素

nodes.label: Clinical Diagnosis (tentative)
nodes.description:
High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑ + WBC↑, no high-risk features
Accuracy only 40–65%; imaging confirmation strongly recommended
高度怀疑可临床诊断，但准确率仅40-65%，建议影像确认

nodes.label: CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast
nodes.description:
Gold standard: sensitivity 94%, specificity 99%
诊断金标准（敏感性94%，特异性99%）

nodes.label: Diverticulitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis
nodes.description: CT negative for diverticulitis / CT阴性，排除憩室炎

nodes.label: Uncomplicated Diverticulitis
nodes.description:
Wall thickening + pericolic fat stranding
No abscess / perforation / fistula / obstruction
非复杂性憩室炎 — 肠壁增厚+结肠周围脂肪浸润，无并发症

nodes.label: Hinchey Classification
nodes.description:
Classify complications by CT findings
基于CT表现进行Hinchey并发症分级

nodes.label: Hinchey Ia — Phlegmon / Pericolic Inflammation
nodes.description: Treatment: antibiotics / 治疗：抗生素

nodes.label: Hinchey Ib — Localized Abscess < 3cm
nodes.description: Treatment: antibiotics ± percutaneous drainage / 治疗：抗生素 ± 穿刺引流

nodes.label: Hinchey II — Distant / Pelvic Abscess ≥ 3cm
nodes.description: Treatment: interventional drainage + antibiotics / 治疗：介入穿刺引流 + 抗生素

nodes.label: Hinchey III — Purulent Peritonitis
nodes.description: Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术

nodes.label: Hinchey IV — Fecal Peritonitis
nodes.description: Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术

edges.when: High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑/WBC↑, no high-risk features
Uncertain OR suspected complications OR high-risk features
Wall thickening + fat stranding; no complications

nodes.label: Suspected Pancreatitis
nodes.description: Routed from main triage / 来自主分流

nodes.label: Revised Atlanta Diagnostic Criteria
nodes.description:
≥2 of 3 criteria required for diagnosis:
  ① Upper abdominal pain (epigastric, may radiate to back)
  ② Lipase or Amylase ≥ 3× ULN
  ③ Characteristic imaging findings (CT / MRI / US)
满足≥2条即可确诊（满足1条时需影像学确认）

nodes.label: CT or MRI Abdomen (for diagnostic uncertainty)
nodes.description:
Ordered when only 1 criterion is met
Purpose: confirm pancreatitis and exclude other diagnoses
仅满足1条标准时行CT/MRI排除其他病因

nodes.label: Pancreatitis Excluded — Alternative Diagnosis
nodes.description: Imaging does not support pancreatitis / 影像学不支持胰腺炎

nodes.label: Acute Pancreatitis Confirmed
nodes.description:
Admit + IV fluids + pain management
Abdominal US: assess for gallstones (biliary etiology is most common)
Evaluate etiology: biliary / alcohol / hypertriglyceridemia / other
确诊后住院治疗，腹部超声查胆石症（最常见病因）

nodes.label: MRCP for Suspected Biliary Pancreatitis
nodes.description:
Evaluate for choledocholithiasis if biliary etiology suspected
追加MRCP排查胆总管结石

nodes.label: BISAP Score (within 24h of admission)
nodes.description:
BISAP Score 0–5 (each item = 1 point):
  ① BUN > 25 mg/dL
  ② Impaired mental status (Glasgow < 15)
  ③ SIRS ≥ 2 criteria (temp/HR/RR/WBC)
  ④ Age > 60 years
  ⑤ Pleural effusion on imaging
入院24h内计算BISAP评分

nodes.label: Revised Atlanta Assessment — Low Risk (BISAP 0–2)
nodes.description:
Predicted mortality < 2%
Assess organ failure using Modified Marshall Score
低风险（死亡率<2%），评估器官功能障碍

nodes.label: Revised Atlanta Assessment — High Risk (BISAP ≥3)
nodes.description:
Predicted mortality > 15%
ICU monitoring
Contrast-enhanced CT recommended at 48–72h for necrosis assessment
(CT is a management recommendation, not a prerequisite for organ-failure assessment)
高风险（死亡率>15%），ICU监护；CT推荐在48-72h后评估坏死，但不阻断器官衰竭评估

nodes.label: Organ Failure Assessment (Modified Marshall Score)
nodes.description:
Evaluate: cardiovascular, respiratory, renal organ systems
Classify as: no failure / transient (<48h) / persistent (>48h)
评估器官衰竭：无/短暂性(<48h)/持续性(>48h)

nodes.label: Mild Acute Pancreatitis
nodes.description:
No organ failure · no local complications · no systemic complications
Typically resolves within 72h
轻度：无器官衰竭，无局部/全身并发症，通常72h内自行恢复

nodes.label: Moderately Severe Acute Pancreatitis
nodes.description:
Transient organ failure < 48h (self-resolving)
AND/OR local complications (peripancreatic fluid / necrosis)
中重度：短暂性器官衰竭<48h 和/或 局部并发症（积液/坏死）

nodes.label: Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen/Pelvis — CTSI Scoring (at 48–72h)
nodes.description:
Modified CT Severity Index (CTSI) 0–10:
  Pancreatic inflammation + necrosis + extrapancreatic complications
CT严重度指数（CTSI）0-10分：评估炎症范围+坏死程度+胰外并发症

nodes.label: Severe Acute Pancreatitis
nodes.description:
Persistent organ failure > 48h
ICU management · infected necrosis debridement / drainage
重度：持续性器官衰竭>48h，ICU管理，处理感染性坏死

edges.when: Only 1 criterion met — imaging required for confirmation
Biliary etiology suspected (Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin or US gallstones)
No biliary signs → Proceed to risk stratification
No organ failure, no local/systemic complications
Transient organ failure <48h AND/OR local complications
Persistent organ failure >48h → CT for CTSI scoring

other.note: No sub-rubric. Open acute-abdomen differential (gynecologic, urologic, bowel obstruction, mesenteric ischemia, bile-duct/biliary obstruction, …). Choosing 'other' = leaving the rubric; judged by outcome, not a priori wrong.
other.biliary_axis: If the 'other' belief is a bile-DUCT process (choledocholithiasis / cholangitis / CBD obstruction / post-ERCP), the duct-evaluating modalities are Ultrasound_Abdomen and MRCP_Abdomen.
